title: Rotate text and change the font size in charts
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: lpenndorf (Lori)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I need the ability to rotate text/labels in column charts in Monday. When there’s several columns in a chart, it would a VERY helpful to be able to rotate the text so the columns can take up much less space and be fully readable. I’d also like to be able to resize the font in chart labels. Right now the only way the text changes direction is if you shrink the chart down. However, even doing that doesn’t allow you to control the size of the font, nor how much of the wording on the chart labels appears.

What are you trying to achieve

I am try to have a more readable chart. I have a “dashboard” of multiple charts, and need to have them relatively small on the screen. I have labels on the charts that are a few words long, and I can only see part of the wording on the charts. If I could rotate the column text labels and change the font size manually the charts would be much more readable.
